Simplified: 这是你的爸爸吗？他多大年纪了？
Traditional: 這是你的爸爸嗎？他多大年紀了？
Pinyin: Zhè shì nǐ de bà ba ma? Tā duō dà nián ji le?
English: Is that your father? How old is he?

Simplified: 我想想看。他今年五十三岁了。
Traditional: 我想想看。他今年五十三歲了。
Pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xiǎng kàn. Tā jīn nián wǔ shí sān suì le.
English: Let me think. This year he is fifty-three.

Simplified: 他旁边站着的是你的姐姐吗？
Traditional: 他旁邊站著的是你的姐姐嗎？
Pinyin: Tā páng biān zhàn zhe de shì nǐ de jiě jie ma?
English: Is the one standing next to him your older sister?

Pinyin: Bù, tā shì wǒ de mèi mei.
English: No, she is my younger sister.
